root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , ( select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as manager_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date as loan_requestment_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) loan_requestment_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no as membership_no
, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,' ' ) as spouse_name
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '65พ000011'
